# Inthegra Software

> Oracle-native enterprise software company specializing in healthcare, credit/financial services, and retail ERP solutions. Founded in 2004, based in Argentina.

## Company Overview

Inthegra Software develops enterprise platforms built on Oracle technology for healthcare organizations, financial/credit institutions, and retail businesses across Latin America.

## Products

- [HealthCare Suite](https://inthegrasoftware.com/productos/healthcare/): ERP for healthcare — prepaid medicine, social security, occupational health, home care. Clients include SIPSSA, EMI, Alta Salud.
- [Credit & Financial Suite](https://inthegrasoftware.com/productos/credit-financial/): Platform for loans and credit card management. Clients include Elebar, Sucredito, La Zonal.
- [ERP for Retail & Services](https://inthegrasoftware.com/productos/retail/): Business suite for retail, wholesale, and services. Hub of the ERP product.
  - [Supply Chain](https://inthegrasoftware.com/productos/retail/supply-chain/): Planning, purchasing, and procurement module.
  - [Warehouse Management (WMS)](https://inthegrasoftware.com/productos/retail/wms/): Warehouse and logistics operations.
  - [Ecommerce Platform](https://inthegrasoftware.com/productos/retail/ecommerce/): Online storefront integrated with ERP catalog, stock, and pricing.
  - [People Care (HR)](https://inthegrasoftware.com/productos/retail/people-care/): Payroll, employee records, and talent development.

## Oracle Services

- [Oracle Forms Modernization](https://inthegrasoftware.com/servicios-oracle/modernizacion/): Migration from Oracle Forms to Oracle APEX.
- [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)](https://inthegrasoftware.com/servicios-oracle/oci/): Cloud migration and managed infrastructure.
- [Oracle Analytics Cloud (OAC)](https://inthegrasoftware.com/servicios-oracle/analytics/): Business intelligence and analytics implementation.
- [Production AI](https://inthegrasoftware.com/servicios-oracle/production-ai/): AI integration for enterprise processes.
- [Custom Development](https://inthegrasoftware.com/servicios-oracle/desarrollo-medida/): Bespoke Oracle APEX application development.

## Solutions

- [CRM](https://inthegrasoftware.com/soluciones/crm/): Customer relationship management.
- [AI Chatbot](https://inthegrasoftware.com/soluciones/ai-chatbot/): Intelligent conversational assistants for enterprises.
- [Process Automation & Orchestration](https://inthegrasoftware.com/soluciones/automatizaciones/): Enterprise workflow automation powered by n8n on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. Integrates ERP, CRM, WhatsApp, and AI agents.

- [Contact](https://inthegrasoftware.com/contacto/): Contact form and information.
